/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libBaseController.so -o libBaseController.so CMakeFiles/BaseController.dir/BaseController_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BaseController.dir/BaseController.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/lib/argos3  -L/mnt/c/Users/aleks/OneDrive/Desktop/Masters_Classes/Robotics/Github_Folder/CPFA_AHCFA_Final_Project/CPFA_Base_ARGoS-main/build  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/argos3:/mnt/c/Users/aleks/OneDrive/Desktop/Masters_Classes/Robotics/Github_Folder/CPFA_AHCFA_Final_Project/CPFA_Base_ARGoS-main/build -Wl,-Bstatic -ldl -lpthread -Wl,-Bdynamic -lfreeimage -lfreeimageplus -lGL -lGLU -lglut -lXmu -lXi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 -llua5.3 -lm -largos3core_simulator -largos3plugin_simulator_footbot -largos3plugin_simulator_genericrobot /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
